title: Dee's Random Stuff
description: Adds a lot of useful things for builders / survivors.
body:
This mod adds a lot useful things for builders/suvivors.

## Features
### Vertical Slabs
We always imagine that we have the vertical slabs, now it's here! Though there are a lot of mods add vertical slabs, I still added it because there will be blocks that can interact with this block in my plan.
![Vertical Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9b0b910b8a77ca0b0f798cbd29ac6019b8877b7.png)
### Corners
To make vertical blocks can be connected smoothly, I also add corner block into Minecraft. It looks like a vertical version of stairs.
![Corner blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85b9a966fd4f42426473560534ec4dcc7b33b3e0.png)
### Pillars
This is my favorite block. Pillar is a block that only take 1/4 block size, however you can fill a block space by your preference with pillars.
![Pillars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6989f2b4d74e0854ce4b02c56fefbbb3201d050.png)

More features will be added in the future!
